title: cheilanthes siliquosa f. carlotta-halliae
intro: Cheilanthes siliquosa f. carlotta-halliae, also known as the fern species Carlotta Hall's Lip Fern, is a type of evergreen fern native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It is used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are derived from its leaves. The health benefits of this plant include relief from arthritis, digestive issues, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory health. The leaves of Cheilanthes siliquosa f. carlotta-halliae are typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for medicinal use.
